channel.title: Messaging on fossick
channel.description: Recent content in Messaging on fossick

item.title: Distributed System - Part 1
item.description: The simplest of applications we can write and maintain are the ones that run with a single thread on a single processor. We know why we don’t do that, because there is only so much we can achieve with such a system. The main concerns with this set up are Scale We want more resources (CPU, GPU, memory, or storage) than what is available on single server. Buying bigger server, even if available, is not efficient in terms of cost and server utilisation.
